changes: 3/14 update: Fixed proxy reliability, fixed many bugs, and added a homescreen feature.
3/15 update: Fixed more bugs and improved UX in multiple places.
3/15 update 2: Customization overhaul with more themes and replacement of the CSS editor with Custom Themes.
4/11 update: Full overhaul of features, games, and customization.
95% of the 5000+ games now work; all entertainment options except Ghost Music were working at this point.
Added many settings and improved overall UI/UX.
AI integration improved with Duck.ai and VM performance increased.
4/12 update: Fixed chat source, fixed music source, and fixed multiple connectivity and UI/UX bugs.
Reliability milestone reached with broad feature parity and improved stability.
Small update: Fixed Ghost Music playback.
Published full documentation including Ghost Docs and README updates.
Promoted release track from Beta to Stable for versions 1.4 and onward.
